name: Ceylon Black Tea (250g)
description: High-grown Ceylon black tea, whole leaf. Sourced from the misty highlands of Sri Lanka for a rich, full-bodied cup.

name: Green Tea with Lemongrass
description: Blended green tea with lemongrass and citrus notes. A refreshing and aromatic infusion perfect for any time of day.

name: Cinnamon Sticks (100g)
description: True Ceylon cinnamon, sun-dried. Delicate, sweet, and aromatic — the finest variety of cinnamon in the world.

name: Cardamom Pods (50g)
description: Whole green cardamom pods. Intensely fragrant with a warm, spicy-sweet flavour essential to Sri Lankan cuisine.

name: Black Pepper (100g)
description: Wild-harvested Ceylon black pepper. Bold pungency and complex heat, hand-picked from Sri Lankan forest gardens.

name: Handwoven Reed Basket
description: Traditional handwoven basket from Sri Lankan reed. Each piece is unique, crafted by skilled artisans in the Walawe region.

name: Batik Wall Hanging
description: Hand-dyed batik fabric wall art. Vivid patterns inspired by traditional Sri Lankan motifs and natural dye techniques.

name: Wooden Elephant Carving
description: Hand-carved teakwood elephant figurine. A symbol of strength and wisdom, meticulously detailed by Kandy craftsmen.

name: Handloom Cotton Sarong
description: Traditional handloom cotton sarong. Lightweight, breathable, and woven in time-honoured patterns from coastal Sri Lanka.

name: Batik Cotton Shirt
description: Batik-printed cotton shirt, unisex. Vibrant hand-applied batik patterns on a relaxed-fit 100% cotton garment.
